# Apex Web Studio

> Apex Web Studio is a Mississauga-based (Greater Toronto Area) web design agency that builds fast, custom, hand-coded websites for small businesses across Canada and the United States. Flexible monthly subscription plans with zero upfront fees, or one-time builds.

Apex Web Studio designs and develops fully custom websites — no page builders or bloated templates. Every site is hand-coded for speed, built with on-page SEO foundations (schema markup, clean heading structure), and includes hosting, security, daily backups and ongoing maintenance. Core services: custom web design, e-commerce stores, local SEO, brand identity, and lead automation. The studio is located in Mississauga, Ontario, and serves clients across Canada and the USA, handled entirely online.

- Contact: contact@apexwebstudio.ca | +1 (365) 737-1707
- Pricing: subscription plans from $149/month (no upfront cost, 12-month term), or a one-time build from $499
- Packages: Landing Page, Growth (up to 5 pages), Enterprise (up to 10 pages), E-Commerce

## Main pages
- [Apex Web Studio — Home](https://www.apexwebstudio.ca/): Overview of services, pricing plans, and the project inquiry form.
- [Locations](https://www.apexwebstudio.ca/locations.html): Full directory of every city served across Canada and the USA.

## Web design by city — Canada
